ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the security (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Group or category of the security (e.g., A, XD) */,
  "face_value" REAL /* Face value of the security */,
  "isin_no" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the security (e.g., 2/3 Wheelers) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security (e.g., Automobiles) */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector of the security (e.g., Two Wheelers) */,
  "cik_no" TEXT /* Commission File Number (CIK) for the security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the security was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the security was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_classifications" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry classification */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry classification */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry classification (e.g., Automobiles) */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector of the industry classification (e.g., Two Wheelers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., Equity, Bond) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the market data feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of market data feed (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  "feed_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of market data feed updates (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "data_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the market data feed (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_instruments" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_industry_classifications" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_market_data_feeds" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id", "feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_prices" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_trades" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of securities traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the securities traded */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "broker" TEXT /* Broker involved in the trade (e.g., Merrill Lynch) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trade was executed (e.g., NYSE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id", "date", "trade_type")
)
